data_work

General first data pull

Depth over years, starting in 2003-07-15

## Warning: Removed 9131 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

Computations for depth x SWE

# getting a better estimate than Mizukami (will just be comparison for what we do)
# density(ps) = denswater(pw) (swe/depth)
# take an average value of the densities over around 15 years (up until 2020)
  # apply it to the last 5 years individually to evaluate how good that average is 
# compare to the 164.7 kg/m^3
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    snow_density = case_when(
      is.na(snow_depth) | is.na(snow_water_equivalent) ~ NA_real_,
      snow_depth <= 0 ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ (snow_water_equivalent / snow_depth) * 1000  # kg/m^3
    )
  )

15-year graph with trend

Density over the years, starting october 1
